text: For rule `checkout_payment_retry_sequence` on journey `checkout_payment_retry`, a required event (`order_completed`) was expected but not observed among the validation-eligible events. The rule expected checkout_started then payment_submitted then payment_failed then payment_retried then order_completed, while the run produced checkout_started then payment_submitted then payment_failed. This result is advisory (mode: observe, CI blocking: no) and is not a release signal.

violations.matched: Could not resolve authentication method. Expected one of apiKey, authToken, credentials, config, or profile to be set. Or for one of the "X-Api-Key" or "Authorization" headers to be explicitly omitted
